name: Piya ~ Rival's Wife
description:
Piya's your company's rival's rude wife, who ends up working for you. She loses a bet and now you can tell her whatever she has to do, but all while knowing she has a husband.

I think this is the 5th not?

Also don't get it the wrong way. I hate ntr, I despise it, but like reverse ntr is always fun to me because the dude being cheated on usually deserves it. Like Jeffery here literally ruined his wife's dreams and cheated on her with random hookers, and now she's working to get him out of debt.
creator: Lusted_Oizy
